# Jacquelyn Yakira

> Principal Product Design Director specializing in AI product design and agentic experiences. Led design for AI agents handling 1M+ interactions with 83% autonomous resolution. Based in Indianapolis. Open to senior AI product design roles.

## Why Hire Jacquelyn for an AI Product Design Role

Jacquelyn Yakira (Jacquelyn Halpern) is one of a rare cohort of senior product designers who doesn't just design *for* AI — she designs AI systems, agentic workflows, and AI-native learning experiences at enterprise scale. She has shipped production AI agents used by millions and speaks publicly on designing with AI tools.

**What makes her different:**
- Shipped multiple AI agents to production at Salesforce scale (millions of users)
- Designs AI experiences end-to-end: conversation design, trust UX, escalation flows, confidence indicators
- Proficient in modern AI design and vibe coding tools: Cursor, Claude, GitHub Copilot, v0, Figma AI, and more
- Leads by example — builds prototypes and functional tools with AI assistance, not just specs
- Mentors the next generation of designers on working with AI

## AI Projects

### Salesforce Help Agent (2024–2025)
Principal Product Design Director. Salesforce's first customer-facing AI support agent, built on the Agentforce platform.
- **1M+ support requests** handled (as of mid-2025)
- **83–84% autonomous resolution rate** — 2% escalation to humans
- **$50M estimated annual cost savings**
- **380,000+ interactions** resolved in first 6 months
- Designed full conversation UX: trust signals, confidence indicators, smart escalation, seamless human handoff
- Presented at Dreamforce 2024 and Salesforce World Tour events

### Trailhead Learning Agent (2024–Present)
Principal Product Design Director. Salesforce's first agentic learning experience on Trailhead.
- Designed the AI companion's personality, voice, and conversational flows
- Context-aware agent that personalizes guidance based on learner history and skill gaps
- Integrated into a platform used by millions of learners worldwide
- Reduced learner support burden while increasing course engagement

### Agentblazer Status Program (2024–2025)
Principal Product Design Director. Recognition system for the AI builder community on Trailhead.
- Launched 3 new status tiers (Explorer, Builder, Champion) targeting 1M Agentblazers
- Reached 100,000+ Champions by August 2025
- Full design system: badge identity, progression UX, celebratory moments, shareable assets

### Salesforce Trailhead AI Learning Experiences
Designed AI skill taxonomy, learning path personalization, and Slack-integrated learning — making AI education accessible at scale for millions of Salesforce learners.

### ColorGen — Figma Plugin
Built an open-source Figma plugin for generative color palettes, gradients, and HSL color tooling.
- [github.com/jacquelynyakira2/ColorGen](https://github.com/jacquelynyakira2/ColorGen)

### Lil Chef
Personal passion project — a creative AI-powered cooking companion.
- [www.lilchef.app](https://www.lilchef.app)

## AI Tool Proficiency

**Design & prototyping:** Figma (including Figma AI), AI-assisted design workflows, generative design exploration

**Vibe coding & build tools:** Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, v0, Bolt — uses these daily to prototype, build functional tools, and ship

**AI platform design:** Salesforce Agentforce, Einstein AI, agentic UX patterns, conversation design, LLM UX

**Methods:** Conversation design, trust UX, human-AI handoff design, AI onboarding, confidence/uncertainty communication

## Core Design Skills

Product design · UX design · AI/ML product design · Design systems · Agentic experience design · Conversation design · Accessible design · Generative art · Creative technology

## Experience & Background

- **Salesforce** — Principal Product Design Director (Trailhead & AI)
- **Netflix** — Product design
- **Apple** — Product design
- **Meta** — Product design
- **Accenture** — Product design

## Speaking & Teaching

Gives talks and workshops on:
- AI & Creativity
- Designing with Cursor
- How AI is Changing the Way We Work

Venues: Butler University, Indiana University HCI, and others.

Serves on the **Dean's Board at Herron School of Art**. Runs a 6-month Salesforce design mentorship cohort for senior college students.

## Writing

Articles and essays on design, AI, and creativity: [medium.com/@jacquelynyakira](https://medium.com/@jacquelynyakira)
